question: I've had a high fever, chills, and severe muscle aches two weeks after returning from sub-Saharan Africa. Could this be malaria and how urgent is it?
I just received an HIV-positive test result. I don't understand what this means for my health and my life. What are the next steps?
I have a prosthetic joint replacement and developed a fever and redness around the joint. How serious is a prosthetic joint infection?
I keep getting skin infections with MRSA. What is MRSA, why does it keep coming back, and how do I decolonize?
My doctor wants to start me on PrEP for HIV prevention. How effective is it and what are the side effects?
I have chronic hepatitis B that my doctor said is inactive. Do I need treatment and what monitoring do I need?
I've developed a circular bull's-eye rash after hiking in the woods last week. Could this be Lyme disease and what should I do?
I'm immunocompromised due to a transplant and developed a persistent cough and fever. My CT shows nodules in my lungs. What infections should be considered?
I had endocarditis and was on six weeks of IV antibiotics. I'm feeling better. Can I switch to oral antibiotics?
I'm traveling to Southeast Asia for three weeks. What vaccinations and prophylactic medications do I need?
I've had recurrent C. difficile colitis three times. My gastroenterologist mentioned fecal microbiota transplant. What is this and does it work?
My elderly parent was hospitalized with sepsis. The doctor says the bacteria is resistant to most antibiotics. What does multidrug-resistant organism mean?
I've been bitten by a bat. Do I need rabies post-exposure prophylaxis even if the bat didn't seem sick?
I have osteomyelitis in my foot from a diabetic wound. My surgeon wants to amputate but my ID doctor thinks antibiotics alone might work. Who is right?
I have a fever for two weeks with no obvious source. My doctor ordered an extensive workup. What is a fever of unknown origin and what are the common causes?
I was exposed to tuberculosis at work. My skin test is positive but my chest x-ray is normal. Do I need treatment for latent TB?
I've been on antibiotics for six weeks for osteomyelitis and still have elevated inflammatory markers. How do I know if the infection is cured?
I have a diabetic foot ulcer that is infected. How do ID specialists decide which antibiotics to use and when does it require hospitalization?
I need surgery but I'm colonized with VRE. What special precautions are needed and does VRE affect my surgical risk?
I have genital herpes and want to minimize transmission to my partner. What medications and precautions are most effective?
I'm a healthcare worker and had a needlestick from a known HIV-positive patient. What do I do in the next hour?
I live in the southwestern US and have flu-like symptoms with a cough that has persisted for a month. Could this be valley fever (coccidioidomycosis)?
I have HIV and my CD4 count has dropped below 200. My doctor wants to start prophylactic antibiotics. Which infections am I at risk for?
I was diagnosed with cytomegalovirus infection. I thought CMV was harmless. When does CMV become serious?
I'm prescribed an antibiotic but the pharmacist said there is a drug interaction with my other medication. How do ID specialists think about antibiotic-drug interactions?
I work in a hospital and keep hearing about antibiotic stewardship. What does this mean in practice and why does it matter?
I have a wound on my arm that looks infected with streaking redness spreading up my arm and a fever. Is this an emergency?
My child has recurrent ear and lung infections. My pediatrician referred us to ID. Could this be a primary immunodeficiency?
I had a tick bite and three weeks later I'm getting joint pain in my knee and fatigue. Could this be late disseminated Lyme disease?
I'm a pregnant woman and I've been told I tested positive for Group B Strep. What does this mean and what happens during my delivery?
